since_last: 63% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +4.95%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 63% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.10% · BTC +2.76% · Gold +1.51% · Nasdaq100 -1.13%. 63% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +4.95%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +4.95%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.90%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at -10.95%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.60%, APP +10.01%, META +9.77%, PLTR +8.90%, PATH +8.79%. Laggards: KLAC -10.95%, AMAT -10.87%, LRCX -10.82%, TER -10.30%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.60% at $161.29
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
